mapper.sql: select c.id, c.site_id, c.parent_id, c.name, c.category_type, c.is_section, c.slug, c.icon, c.description, c.sort_order, c.status, c.del_flag, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, (select count(*) from gb_site_category_relations r where r.category_id = c.id AND r.relation_type = 'include') as related_sites_count, (select count(*) from gb_site_category_relations r where r.category_id = c.id AND r.relation_type = 'exclude') as excluded_sites_count from gb_categories c

if.test: queryMode != null and queryMode == 'related' and siteId != null

select.if:
select c.id, c.site_id, c.parent_id, c.name, c.category_type, c.slug, c.icon, c.description, c.sort_order, c.status, c.del_flag, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, (select count(*) from gb_site_category_relations r where r.category_id = c.id AND r.relation_type = 'include') as related_sites_count, (select count(*) from gb_site_category_relations r where r.category_id = c.id AND r.relation_type = 'exclude') as excluded_sites_count,
(CASE c.category_type WHEN 'game' THEN ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT g.id) FROM gb_games g LEFT JOIN gb_game_category_relations gcr ON g.id = gcr.game_id WHERE g.del_flag = '0' AND (g.site_id = #{siteId} OR g.site_id = #{params.personalSiteId}) AND gcr.category_id = c.id ) WHEN 'gamebox' THEN ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT gb.id) FROM gb_game_boxes gb LEFT JOIN gb_box_category_relations bcr ON gb.id = bcr.box_id WHERE gb.del_flag = '0' AND (gb.site_id = #{siteId} OR gb.site_id = #{params.personalSiteId}) AND (gb.category_id = c.id OR bcr.category_id = c.id) ) WHEN 'article' THEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gb_master_articles ma WHERE ma.category_id = c.id AND ma.del_flag = '0' AND (ma.site_id = #{siteId} OR ma.site_id = #{params.personalSiteId}) ) WHEN 'website' THEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gb_sites s WHERE s.category_id = c.id AND s.del_flag = '0' ) WHEN 'storage' THEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gb_storage_configs sc WHERE sc.category_id = c.id AND sc.del_flag = '0' ) WHEN 'ai_platform' THEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gb_ai_platforms ap WHERE ap.category_id = c.id AND ap.del_flag = '0' AND (ap.site_id = #{siteId} OR ap.site_id = #{params.personalSiteId}) ) WHEN 'atomic_tool' THEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gb_atomic_tool at WHERE at.category_id = c.id AND at.enabled = '1' AND (at.site_id = #{siteId} OR at.site_id = #{params.personalSiteId}) ) WHEN 'workflow' THEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gb_workflow wf WHERE wf.category_id = c.id AND wf.enabled = 1 AND (wf.site_id = #{siteId} OR wf.site_id = #{params.personalSiteId}) ) WHEN 'title_pool' THEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gb_title_pool_batch b WHERE b.category_id = c.id AND b.status = '1' AND (b.site_id = #{siteId} OR b.site_id = #{params.personalSiteId}) ) ELSE 0 END) as related_data_count
(CASE c.category_type WHEN 'game' THEN ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT g.id) FROM gb_games g LEFT JOIN gb_game_category_relations gcr ON g.id = gcr.game_id WHERE g.del_flag = '0' AND g.site_id = c.site_id AND gcr.category_id = c.id ) WHEN 'gamebox' THEN ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT gb.id) FROM gb_game_boxes gb LEFT JOIN gb_box_category_relations bcr ON gb.id = bcr.box_id WHERE gb.del_flag = '0' AND gb.site_id = c.site_id AND (gb.category_id = c.id OR bcr.category_id = c.id) ) WHEN 'article' THEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gb_master_articles ma WHERE ma.category_id = c.id AND ma.del_flag = '0' AND ma.site_id = c.site_id ) WHEN 'website' THEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gb_sites s WHERE s.category_id = c.id AND s.del_flag = '0' ) WHEN 'storage' THEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gb_storage_configs sc WHERE sc.category_id = c.id AND sc.del_flag = '0' ) WHEN 'ai_platform' THEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gb_ai_platforms ap WHERE ap.category_id = c.id AND ap.del_flag = '0' AND ap.site_id = c.site_id ) WHEN 'atomic_tool' THEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gb_atomic_tool at WHERE at.category_id = c.id AND at.enabled = '1' AND at.site_id = c.site_id ) WHEN 'workflow' THEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gb_workflow wf WHERE wf.category_id = c.id AND wf.enabled = 1 AND wf.site_id = c.site_id ) WHEN 'title_pool' THEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gb_title_pool_batch b WHERE b.category_id = c.id AND b.status = '1' AND b.site_id = c.site_id ) ELSE 0 END) as related_data_count
from gb_categories c
del_flag = '0'
and (site_id = #{siteId} OR site_id = #{params.personalSiteId})
and site_id = #{siteId}
and site_id = #{params.personalSiteId}
and 1 = 0
and parent_id = #{parentId} and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%') and category_type = #{categoryType} and is_section = #{isSection} and status = #{status}
order by sort_order asc, create_time desc

mapper.insert:
insert into gb_categories
site_id, parent_id, name, category_type, is_section, slug, icon, description, sort_order, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time,
#{siteId}, #{parentId}, #{name}, #{categoryType}, #{isSection}, #{slug}, #{icon}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime},
mapper.update: update gb_categories set del_flag = '2' where id = #{id}

update gb_categories set del_flag = '2' where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT c.*, (select count(*) from gb_site_category_relations r where r.category_id = c.id) as related_sites_count FROM gb_categories c INNER JOIN gb_box_category_relations r ON c.id = r.category_id WHERE r.box_id = #{boxId} AND c.status = '1' AND c.del_flag = '0' AND c.category_type = 'game_box' ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC

SELECT DISTINCT c.*, (select count(*) from gb_site_category_relations r where r.category_id = c.id) as related_sites_count FROM gb_categories c INNER JOIN gb_game_category_relations r ON c.id = r.category_id WHERE r.game_id = #{gameId} AND c.status = '1' AND c.del_flag = '0' AND c.category_type = 'game' ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC

SELECT DISTINCT c.*, (select count(*) from gb_site_category_relations r where r.category_id = c.id) as related_sites_count FROM gb_categories c WHERE c.id IN ( SELECT m.category_id FROM gb_articles a INNER JOIN gb_master_articles m ON a.master_article_id = m.id AND m.del_flag = '0' WHERE a.id = #{articleId} AND a.del_flag = '0' ) AND c.status = '1' AND c.del_flag = '0' AND c.category_type = 'article' ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC

c.del_flag = '0' AND c.category_type = 'article' AND c.parent_id = 0 AND c.is_section = '1'
AND (c.site_id = #{siteId} OR c.site_id = #{personalSiteId})
AND c.site_id = #{siteId}
AND c.status = '1'
ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC, c.create_time DESC

c.del_flag = '0' AND c.category_type = 'article' AND c.parent_id = #{sectionId} AND c.status = '1'
ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC
